#  Filter Drawing Markups (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * **Orange eye** ![Icon View Layer Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c990e190a723a0a46b7c4327a52a60bf/b37f1b89253c2e8aaecf80d6b167f613/icon-view-layer-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icons indicate a markup type is visible.
    * **Gray eye**


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to view.


You can filter drawing markups in the following ways:
#### Filter Drawing Layers
  1. Tap the **filters** ![Icon Filter Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/378115d4e9f1d0f01833595be1d9e164/b047a01520983533d9a1480d20178fd2/icon-filter-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.  
  
![Drawings Ios Filter Drawing Markups](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/330622d1f716e32306547e5e69288d0b/9b7045e1d0c6deffa841caf16311031e/drawings-ios-filter-drawing-markups.png?fm=webp)  

  2. In the 'Layers' section:
     * Tap the **eye** ![Icon View Layer Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c990e190a723a0a46b7c4327a52a60bf/b37f1b89253c2e8aaecf80d6b167f613/icon-view-layer-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon next to 'Published Layer' to show or hide all published markups that exist on the drawing.
     * Tap the **eye** ![Icon View Layer Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c990e190a723a0a46b7c4327a52a60bf/b37f1b89253c2e8aaecf80d6b167f613/icon-view-layer-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon next to 'Personal Layer' to show or hide any personal markups that you have added to the drawing.


#### Filter Drawing Markups
  1. Tap the **filters** ![Icon Filter Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/378115d4e9f1d0f01833595be1d9e164/b047a01520983533d9a1480d20178fd2/icon-filter-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.  
  
![Drawings Ios Filter Drawing Markups](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/330622d1f716e32306547e5e69288d0b/9b7045e1d0c6deffa841caf16311031e/drawings-ios-filter-drawing-markups.png?fm=webp)  

  2. Tap the **eye** ![Icon View Layer Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c990e190a723a0a46b7c4327a52a60bf/b37f1b89253c2e8aaecf80d6b167f613/icon-view-layer-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon next to a markup type to show or hide that type of markup on the drawing.
  3. _Optional:_ You can filter Punch Pins, Observations, and RFI markups further by tapping **Filters** and applying additional filters.


## See Also
  * [View Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawing-markups-ios)
  * [Create or Link Coordination Issues on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-or-link-coordination-issues-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
title: Filter Drawing Markups (iOS)
description: How to filter drawing markups in the Drawings tool on the Procore iOS app.
